channel.title: What, How and Why in Software
channel.description: Recent content on What, How and Why in Software

item.title: Why gRPC Is Fast
item.description: Explains why gRPC outperforms REST in distributed systems.

item.title: About
item.description:
Welcome to What, How and Why in Software!

I’m a passionate software engineer dedicated to demystifying technical concepts. This blog is where I explore the fundamentals and intricacies of modern software development.

I have around 6 years of experience in software development and have worked on various technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, AWS, and more.

Who is this for?

  • Developers looking to deepen their understanding.
  • Interviewee searching for clear explanations.
  • Anyone curious about software engineering.

Connect with me on LinkedIn or follow my code on GitHub.
